Rash Evaluation 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a rash evaluation? 
A rash evaluation is a test to find out what is causing a rash . As part of the evaluation, your health care provider will ask about your medical history and your rash. They may ask you if you have started using any new soaps, lotions, cosmetics , or household products . Also, tell your provider if your skin comes in contact with any irritating substances, for e
